positive: A stunning, symmetrical, circular graphic illustration featuring stylized mountain ranges, meandering celestial rivers, and interwoven constellations. The composition should resemble a mystical map or zodiac wheel, dominated by negative space and clean silhouettes. Incorporate detailed, stylized elements like crescent moons, geometric nebulae clusters, and bioluminescent flora (e.g., stylized leaves and fern motifs). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, dusty sage green, burnt orange, and crisp cream. Style must be highly intricate, detailed line art mixed with solid, flat color fills (vector art style). The lighting should imply an ethereal glow emanating from the central subject, emphasizing clean edges and strong visual contrast suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Intricate detail, modern mystical aesthetic, flat illustration, pop art style, clean linework.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, low detail, dirty, grainy, photo, realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, sketch, cropped, jpeg artifacts
